Refer Friends, Earn $50 Each

Share your personal referral link with friends. When they sign up and make their first deposit of $25 or more, you both receive a $50 bonus credited instantly to your wallet.

How It Works

1
🔗

Share Your Link

Copy your unique referral link and share it with friends via social media, text, or email.

2
💳

Friend Signs Up & Deposits

Your friend creates an account using your link and makes their first deposit of $25 or more.

3
🎉

You Both Get $50

Once the deposit clears, a $50 bonus is credited instantly to both your wallets. No limits on referrals!

  • Both the referrer and the referred friend must have verified accounts at Matrix Spins Casino.
  • The referred friend must be a new player who has never held an account at Matrix Spins.
  • The $50 bonus is credited after the referred friend completes a minimum first deposit of $25.
  • Bonus funds carry a 10x wagering requirement before withdrawal is permitted.
  • Self-referrals, duplicate accounts, and fraudulent activity will result in forfeiture of all bonuses and possible account suspension.
  • There is no limit to the number of friends you can refer.
  • Referral bonuses are processed within 24 hours of the qualifying deposit.
  • Matrix Spins Casino reserves the right to modify or discontinue the referral program at any time.
  • Standard promotional terms and site-wide terms of service apply. See Terms of Service for full details.
